checked_statement: No denial or contradiction search was performed for this article-method pack.
safe_wording: This pack can say what the article argues. It must not say the trade, tariff, supply-chain, or consumer-price claims have been externally proven.

checked_statement: Reuters reported the EU low-value parcel duty agreement and timing.
safe_wording: Reuters reported that EU finance ministers agreed to a temporary 3 euro duty on low-value e-commerce parcels from July 1, 2026. Do not present this single source as a full publication fact-check.

checked_statement: The European Commission published official context on low-value e-commerce consignments and customs reform.
safe_wording: The European Commission said around 4.6 billion low-value consignments not exceeding 150 euros entered the EU market in 2024 and linked this to customs reform. Do not use this source alone for the later 3 euro July 2026 duty claim.

checked_statement: Guardian reporting on IFS research supports general consumer-impact context.
safe_wording: Guardian reporting on IFS research supports the general point that price rises on cheaper goods can affect lower-income households more sharply. Do not use it to claim measured impact from the EU parcel duty.
